title: MTR4 - Tokyo Metro 9000 (eidan 9000)
description: Re-texture of Eidan 9000 with Tokyo Metro livery from each line
body:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BTfzQ1p_sJ8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>The TRTA/Tokyo Metro 05 series (営団・東京メトロ05系, Eidan/Tōkyō Metoro 05-kei) is an electric multiple unit (EMU) train type operated on the Tokyo Metro Tozai Line and Tokyo Metro Chiyoda Line Ayase Branch in Japan by the subway operator Tokyo Metro. Some sets have also been shipped to Indonesia, where they operated on the KRL Commuterline system in Jakarta between 2011 and 2025.

**Disclaimer**

This pack is re-textures of the default MTR (Minecraft Transit Railway) train: the Eidan 9000. The model itself is unchanged, only the textures have been changed. This pack includes most of the Tokyo Metro line liveries, such as:
  1. Ginza line
  2. Marunouchi line
  3. Hibiya line
  4. Chiyoda line
  5. Hanzomon line
  6. Fukutoshin line

## Suggestion
- Acceleration: 3,2 km/h/s
- Deceleration: 3,6 km/h/s
- Average speed: 60 - 100 km/h
- Maximum Speed: 120 km/h
- Formation: 4 - 6 car

## How to find the train
![How to find the train](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9926573ef39cb32d8b1e100a7546faa135768c0.png)


## Planning
In the future, we plan to add advertisements inside the train interior, add new livery, and continue to improve the quality of the resource pack.
